sec.title: Getting started
sec.p: This is a paragraph. Select a word and try a toolbar button — bold, italic, or a link.

list-item.p: Press Tab here to nest this item …
… and Shift-Tab to move it back out
To make this a bullet list, select the list in the breadcrumbs above, then change the list-type attribute

sec.p: Ada Lovelace once worked in London — entity names can be linked to external authority databases.

sec.title: A nested section
sec.p: A new section always becomes a child of the section you're currently in. To move it up, use the breadcrumbs below the toolbar to select the entire section, then click the Move Up toolbar button.

sec.ab: Elements not defined in the editor's schema appear with markers to draw your attention.
